description_long: This is a small, brightly colored biplane towing a banner. The fuselage is predominantly blue with black landing gear and a visible propeller at the nose. The airplane features two stacked wings, each with a straight, rectangular planform and no visible winglets. The cockpit is open and situated just behind the upper wing, with a small windscreen. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. A long, rectangular banner is attached to the rear, displaying text in white on a blue background.
description: A small blue biplane with an open cockpit, towing a rectangular banner behind it.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue fuselage, stacked wings, propeller, and the banner trailing behind.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the propeller, landing gear, and the banner extending to the right.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the banner trailing to the left and the biplane's stacked wings visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail, landing gear, and the full width of the trailing banner.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two straight, rectangular wings stacked vertically; no winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a visible propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a small tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open cockpit located just behind the upper wing, likely single-seat with a small windscreen.
